ab: pakisuahlai ma i salia Vanau na?
en: A: Is Vanau at home, please?

ab: ma salia kana’ana, puaruma kia.
en: She’s at home, please come in.

ab: pakisuahlai ma i salia Vanau na?
en: A: Is Vanau at home, please?

ab: uka’a salia kana’ana, pakisuahlai ngasa ta’iara u?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?

ab: ngahlaisa?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: tamu’uhlahlusa ihlaku ia Aruuai, maruapangʉhlʉvʉ kia.
en: A: Grandpa, I’m Aruuai, please open the door.

ab: pakisuahlai ngahalisa?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: Hlaa’u, ihlaku ia ʉlʉkʉ, mʉcʉkʉhlʉ aku ukikirimi ihlau pasaulaula’ʉ.
en: A: Hlaa’u, I’m ʉlʉkʉ, I’ve come to play with you.

ab: rahlu a cu ku arupakakita.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: a’ʉ, tamuucu aku atʉatʉhlʉngʉ ihlau, pasakulai muacʉkʉhlʉa arupakakari.
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!

ab: tuapuru kia, miiama kia hlitavʉra rahlʉngʉ na.
en: B: Please sit down and have some tea.

ab: ’ʉ’ʉraisa.
en: A: Thank you.

ab: miiama kia hlitavʉra rahlʉngʉ na.
en: B: Please have some tea.

ab: tam mavacangʉ miima hlitavʉramu rahlʉngʉ na.
en: A: Your tea is delicious.

ab: muara mau umana ita masukiu’u na!
en: B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: a’ʉ, kitaʉ a masukiu’u kani’i na tam mavacangʉ.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: sa’au i masakiu’u na?
en: B: How is the fruit?

ab: a’ʉ, macuisa sa’au.
en: A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: pahlalipingi cu a ina’a na kuaruvaruvana, pasakulai mʉcʉkʉhlʉ umuu!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: a’ʉ, musa ku mana. mararamucu
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: kuatumuhlu kia maatumuhlu kia, cucu’u ita i?
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: hlikutumuhlu cu aku, mavacukucu
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.

ab: kuatumuhlu kia, kukia arinu.
en: B: Eat more, don’t be polite.

ab: a’ʉ, macuisa sa’au.
en: A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: miacikiri cu aku, mungahlngahla mʉcʉkʉhlʉ mana kumita ihlau.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.

ab: a’ʉ, arupakakitamana.
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: ruvana cu, muasa cu aku pauili salia.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.

ab: mungahlangahla mʉcʉkʉhlʉ pasaulaula’ʉ ia!
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: muasaʉlahlʉ kia.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: a’ʉ, maci pi pasamia ia mʉcʉkʉhlʉ mana salia ku pasaulaula’ʉ.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
